channel.title: AfroTools Blog
channel.description: Expert guides on African tax, PAYE, currency, business, and finance. Practical articles for professionals across Nigeria, Kenya, South Africa, Ghana and more.

item.title: Kenya Employer Payroll Compliance 2026 | PAYE, NSSF, SHA and AHL Guide
item.description: Kenya employer payroll compliance guide for 2026 covering KRA PAYE returns, Year 4 NSSF rates, SHIF, Affordable Housing Levy, deadlines, records and controls verified on May 14, 2026.

item.title: Nigeria E-Invoicing 2026 | FIRS MBS and Invoice Readiness Guide
item.description: Nigeria e-invoicing guide for 2026 covering FIRS Merchant-Buyer Solution, NITDA e-invoicing rules, access point providers, invoice data, VAT workflow, and readiness checks verified on May 13, 2026.

item.title: Zambia Employer Payroll Compliance 2026 | ZRA PAYE, NAPSA and NHIMA
item.description: Zambia employer payroll compliance guide for 2026. Check ZRA PAYE bands, NAPSA pension, NHIMA, monthly controls, payslip checks and source verification.

item.title: Ghana Employer Payroll Compliance 2026 | PAYE, SSNIT and GRA Filing Guide
item.description: Ghana employer payroll compliance guide for 2026 covering GRA PAYE returns, current PAYE bands, SSNIT contribution splits, bonus, overtime, casual workers, records and monthly controls verified on May 11, 2026.

item.title: Rwanda Payroll Compliance 2026 | PAYE, RSSB and Employer Deductions
item.description: Rwanda payroll compliance guide for 2026. Check RRA PAYE bands, RSSB pension, medical, maternity and occupational hazard contributions, deadlines, formulas and payslip review steps.

item.title: Uganda Employer Payroll Compliance 2026 | PAYE, NSSF and URA Deadlines
item.description: Uganda employer payroll compliance guide for 2026. Check URA PAYE bands, monthly filing deadlines, NSSF contributions, records, and payroll controls.

item.title: South Africa Travel Allowance 2026/27 | SARS Logbook, PAYE and Kilometre Rates
item.description: Current South Africa travel allowance guide for 2026/27: SARS logbook rules, 495 cents per kilometre, PAYE inclusion, fixed-cost table, and claim workflow.

item.title: Kenya SHIF Deduction 2026 | 2.75% SHA Payroll Guide
item.description: Kenya SHIF deduction guide for 2026. Learn how the 2.75% Social Health Insurance Fund contribution works, how it affects PAYE, and how to check a payslip.

item.title: South Africa Medical Tax Credits 2026/27 | SARS MTC and AMTC
item.description: Current SARS guide to South Africa medical tax credits for 2026/27. Covers MTC rates, additional medical expenses tax credit, PAYE treatment, disability rules, documents and worked formulas.

item.title: South Africa Turnover Tax 2026/27 | SARS Micro Business Rates
item.description: South Africa turnover tax guide verified on May 2, 2026. Current SARS micro business threshold, 2026/27 rates, quick test rules, payment dates, VAT comparison and calculator workflow.

item.title: Kenya Capital Gains Tax 2026 | KRA 15% CGT Guide
item.description: Kenya capital gains tax guide verified on May 2, 2026. KRA 15% CGT rate, net gain formula, due dates, allowable costs, exemptions, iTax steps, and property transfer checklist.

item.title: South Africa Provisional Tax 2026/27 | SARS IRP6 Dates and Calculation Guide
item.description: South Africa provisional tax guide verified on May 1, 2026. SARS IRP6 dates, who must file, 2026/27 tax bands, first and second period calculations, top-up payments, and penalty risks.

item.title: Ghana Withholding Tax 2026 | GRA WHT Rates, Deadlines and Credits
item.description: Current Ghana withholding tax guide for 2026 with GRA rates for dividends, interest, rent, services, goods, works, non-residents, VAT withholding, deadlines and certificates verified on May 1, 2026.

item.title: South Africa Two-Pot Retirement Tax 2026 | Savings Pot Guide
item.description: South Africa two-pot retirement tax guide verified on April 30, 2026. How savings pot withdrawals are taxed, SARS directives, seed capital, annual limits, debt offsets, and calculator checks.

item.title: South Africa Tax-Free Savings Account 2026 | SARS TFSA Limits
item.description: South Africa TFSA guide for 2026/27. Learn the new R46,000 annual limit, R500,000 lifetime cap, 40% excess contribution penalty, withdrawals, transfers, tax treatment and planning workflow.

item.title: Kenya eTIMS Expense Validation 2026 | KRA Invoice Rules
item.description: Kenya eTIMS expense validation guide for 2026. Learn how KRA will match income and expenses to eTIMS, withholding income tax, customs data, buyer PINs, VAT invoices, and iTax returns.

item.title: Car Import Cost in Africa 2026
item.description: A practical comparison of vehicle import cost drivers across Kenya, Ghana, Nigeria, Tanzania, Uganda and Zambia.

item.title: Used Car Import from Japan to Africa 2026
item.description: A practical checklist for checking a Japan used-car import before shipping it to Kenya, Ghana, Nigeria, Tanzania, Uganda or Zambia.

item.title: Kenya Car Import Cost Guide 2026
item.description: A practical guide to estimating Kenya car import cost using KRA valuation, CRSP, KEBS inspection and Mombasa clearing assumptions.

item.title: Ghana Car Import Cost Guide 2026
item.description: A practical guide to estimating Ghana car import cost through GRA, ICUMS, Tema, Takoradi and third-party clearing charges.

item.title: Nigeria Car Import Cost Guide 2026
item.description: A practical guide to estimating Nigeria car import landed cost through NCS documentation, PAAR, valuation, port charges and registration planning.

item.title: Tanzania Car Import Cost Guide 2026
item.description: A practical guide to estimating Tanzania car import cost through TRA UMVVS, Dar es Salaam port clearance, TBS inspection and road-ready charges.

item.title: Uganda Car Import Tax Guide 2026
item.description: A practical guide to estimating Uganda car import tax through URA valuation guidance, corridor costs, environmental levy checks and registration planning.

item.title: Zambia Car Import Duty Guide 2026
item.description: A practical guide to estimating Zambia car import duty through ZRA valuation, motor vehicle specific duties, import VAT, excise and corridor costs.

item.title: Ghana VAT Guide 2026 | 20% Effective Rate, GRA Threshold, Filing and E-VAT
item.description: Ghana VAT guide for 2026 covering the new 20% effective rate, GRA's GH₵750,000 goods threshold, last-working-day filing, withholding VAT, retail scheme rules, and E-VAT checks verified on April 19, 2026.

item.title: Kenya VAT Registration 2026 | KRA Threshold, iTax Steps and eTIMS Rules
item.description: Kenya VAT registration guide 2026. KSh 5 million threshold, iTax steps, eTIMS onboarding, filing deadlines, input VAT rules, and deregistration basics checked against KRA sources on April 18, 2026.

item.title: Uganda VAT Guide 2026 | Registration Threshold, 18% Rate, EFRIS and Filing Deadlines
item.description: Official-source Uganda VAT guide for 2026. Understand the 18% standard rate, zero-rated versus exempt supplies, the UGX 37.5 million threshold, EFRIS obligations, 15-day monthly filing deadlines, and common compliance mistakes.

item.title: Kenya VAT Guide 2026 | KRA Threshold, Filing, eTIMS and Penalties
item.description: Kenya VAT guide for 2026 covering the KRA KSh 5 million threshold, 16% and 0% VAT rates, monthly filing by the 20th, eTIMS, reverse VAT, withholding VAT, and penalties.

item.title: South Africa VAT Registration 2026 | SARS Threshold and eFiling Guide
item.description: South Africa VAT registration guide verified on April 17, 2026. Current SARS thresholds, voluntary registration rules, eFiling steps, supporting documents, and turnover tax comparison.

item.title: VAT Registration in Uganda 2026 | URA Threshold, EFRIS and Filing Guide
item.description: Uganda VAT registration guide 2026. URA's 18% VAT rate, UGX 150 million threshold, the 3-month test, EFRIS setup, filing by the 15th, and practical compliance mistakes to avoid.

item.title: African Startup Funding 2026 - Grants, VCs & Angels
item.description: Where to find startup funding in Africa 2026. Grants, venture capital firms, accelerators, angel investors and alternative funding for African entrepreneurs.

item.title: Stokvel Guide South Africa 2026 - How to Start
item.description: Complete South Africa stokvel guide 2026. How to start a stokvel, draft the constitution, choose a bank account, invest stokvel funds and common pitfalls to avoid.

item.title: Kenya Withholding Tax 2026 | Rates, 5-Day Deadline and iTax Guide
item.description: Understand Kenya withholding tax in 2026: resident and non-resident rates, the current 5-working-day remittance rule, iTax filing steps, dividend and rent edge cases, and common mistakes.

item.title: South Africa Transfer Duty 2026/27 | SARS Rates, Exemptions and Buyer Guide
item.description: A practical South Africa transfer duty guide for 2026/27: current SARS rates, the R1,210,000 exemption threshold, when VAT applies instead, payment timing, and worked property examples.

item.title: Land Survey Costs Nigeria 2026 - Fees & C of O
item.description: How much does land survey cost in Nigeria 2026? Surveyor fees by state, Certificate of Occupancy process, C of O costs and step-by-step guide to securing your land title.

item.title: WhatsApp Business API Africa 2026 - Setup Guide
item.description: Complete guide to WhatsApp Business API for African businesses in 2026. Setup steps, pricing per conversation, BSPs, and automation use cases for Nigeria, Kenya and SA.

item.title: YouTube Monetization Africa 2026 - Earnings Guide
item.description: How much does YouTube pay African creators in 2026? Complete guide to YouTube Partner Program, RPM rates, tax obligations, and income streams for African YouTubers.

item.title: BOQ for Construction in Nigeria 2026 | Costing and Quantity Guide
item.description: Learn how to build a BOQ for construction projects in Nigeria with quantity, pricing, and estimating guidance.

item.title: How to Choose a Business Name in Africa - Legal Guide 2026
item.description: Complete guide to choosing and registering a business name in Nigeria (CAC), Kenya (BRS), Ghana (RGD), and South Africa (CIPC), including trademark protection and domain strategy.

item.title: AfCFTA Explained - Import Duties in Africa 2026
item.description: AfCFTA explained for importers, exporters, and businesses in 2026. Covers tariff liberalisation schedules, rules of origin, country implementation status, and how to take advantage of the agreement.
